channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 330,000 — 6-Bed Townhouse Complex in Vainona Two clusters on one property — 1,125m² with Borehole (Vainona, Harare North)
item.description: USD 330,000 — Vainona, Harare North. 6 beds, 6 baths. 6-Bed Townhouse Complex in Vainona Two clusters on one property — 1,125m² with Borehole. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
